summary: Thought Atlas Core should be repositioned as a local-first Jarvis-native ingestion and graph data engine, with UI work moved out of the production path.

items.title: Thought Atlas Core is a local ingestion engine
items.body: The repo's production responsibility is the local source-to-digest-to-graph-patch pipeline, not a hosted React UI.

source_refs.quote: This repo should be treated as Thought Atlas Core, not the hosted UI.

items.title: UI belongs outside the core path
items.body: The React / Vite UI should remain a prototype and must not define the core build or product direction.
